case_title: GEORGE CENINA VS. NICK ABAIGAR et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY CENINA, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT ABAIGAR, NICK GREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED OCT-30-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ABAIGAR, NICK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT GREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL AND TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE ON DEFENDANT NICK ABAIGAR TO JAN-15-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED DEC-13-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ABAIGAR, NICK
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENINA, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT GREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY NICK ABAIGAR--OWNER. DEFENDANT GREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENINA, GEORGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ABAIGAR, NICK GREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
